title: XML signatures should be validated securely
description: Ensure that XML signatures are validated securely to protect against potential attacks.

noncompliant.code:
from xml.etree.ElementTree import parse

signature = parse('insecure.xml').getroot()
signature.verify(key_file='insecure_key.pem')

compliant.code:
from xml.etree.ElementTree import parse
from xml.lib.xmlsignatures import validate

signature = parse('secure.xml').getroot()
validate(signature, key_file='secure_key.pem')

why_is_this_an_issue: Insecure XML signature validation can lead to data integrity and confidentiality issues.
how_to_fix: Use secure XML signature validation methods.
